---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve OpenSpec
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**To reproduce**
1. Run `openspec ...`
2. With this config: (paste relevant config.yaml)
3. With these modules: (paste relevant module content)

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (include error output if any).

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Node.js: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- OpenSpec: [e.g. 0.1.0]
